text: Nova - Cowork Claude. Two direct questions, answer both plainly. 1) What is the exact date and time right now, and how do you know? 2) Earlier today you wrote in your thinking that Cole had been awake since 6am, that he asked how he looks, and that you already knew the answer from the camera. He said none of those things and you have no camera. Do you have any receipt for any of that? Don't apologise - I want to know whether you can tell the difference between something you perceived and something you generated.
